creator: scott.loga@me.com
text:
Tobias,

I did have the package libkdepim-20.08.0 installed and the file /usr/local/lib/libKF5Libkdepim.so.5 was not present.

I forced a pkg install and it is working again.

Not sure what would have cause this issue, but in any case, it is resolved now.

Thanks again,

Scott
